source_status.name: BizBuySell (SC/NC for-sale)
source_status.reason: disabled: Akamai WAF 403s robots.txt/sitemap/listings to automated fetch (verified 2026-06). WAF defeat is out of scope.

source_status.name: DealStream (businesses for sale)
source_status.reason: disabled: DataDome CAPTCHA wall: every request (incl. /robots.txt) returns HTTP 403 with a geo.captcha-delivery.com challenge to curl-cffi chrome + render (verified 2026-06). CAPTCHA defeat is out of scope. NOT_VIABLE.

source_status.name: LoopNet (businesses for sale)
source_status.reason: disabled: Akamai shell: /biz/ returns a ~2.5KB JS interstitial (no listing data) to curl-cffi chrome AND to the local stealth render (verified 2026-06). Same Akamai wall as BizBuySell. NOT_VIABLE without WAF defeat.

source_status.name: Murphy Business Sales
source_status.reason: disabled: Server-side bot block: murphybusiness.com/listings returns HTTP 503 to curl-cffi chrome on every path/UA tried (verified 2026-06). Re-probe later; may be transient or geo/UA-gated. Currently NOT_VIABLE.

source_status.name: Sunbelt Network (business brokers)
source_status.reason: disabled: MAYBE (render-dependent): sunbeltnetwork.com returns HTTP 200 but the listing grid is client-hydrated — raw HTML carries no asking-price / cash-flow text, and the WP REST API exposes no business-listing post type (verified 2026-06). Needs a Scrapling render pass + per-listing detail parse; enable once that path is built and smoke-tested.

source_status.name: Transworld Business Advisors
source_status.reason: disabled: MAYBE (render-dependent): tworld.com listing + per-location pages are ~1MB JS shells with ZERO server-rendered listing data / dollar amounts (verified 2026-06). No public XHR/JSON endpoint discovered. Needs a render pass or a found API before enabling. NOTE: Transworld inventory is ALSO syndicated to BusinessesForSale.com (us.businessesforsale.com/us/agents/transworld-*), which IS scrapable — prefer that path.

source_status.name: We Sell Restaurants
source_status.reason: disabled: MAYBE (render-dependent): wesellrestaurants.com state pages return HTTP 200 but listing cards + financials are client-hydrated (no price/cash-flow text and no detail-listing slugs in raw HTML, verified 2026-06). Needs a render pass; restaurant-only niche, lower priority than BusinessesForSale.

source_status.name: NC SOS Business Registration
source_status.reason: disabled: sosnc.gov search/reports 403 to automated fetches + policy forbids scripted searches (verified 2026-06); bulk is a paid subscription.

source_status.name: SC SOS Business Entities
source_status.reason: disabled: businessfilings.sc.gov search is reCAPTCHA-gated (verified 2026-06); no free bulk/API. CAPTCHA defeat is out of scope.

source_status.name: SC ABL License Holders
source_status.reason: disabled: SC ABL lookup routes through MyDORWAY portal (302); no downloadable roster. Confirm a no-login/no-CAPTCHA portal path before enabling.
